questions.question: What is the primary difference between supervised and unsupervised machine learning?
questions.hint: Explain the key distinction between these two types of machine learning.

questions.question: What is the purpose of regularization techniques in machine learning?
questions.hint: Describe the role of regularization in preventing overfitting.

questions.question: Explain the concept of bias-variance tradeoff in machine learning.
questions.hint: Discuss the importance of balancing model complexity and simplicity.
